---
title: "Welcome to Trident Moon!"
description-meta: >
    Ashtanga Yoga in Central Kentucky.  Information on classes,
    articles about Ashtanga, Sanskrit, Tantra and related topics.
    Resources for students.
---

Trident Moon promotes the practice of Aṣṭāṅga Yoga and meditation in Central Kentucky.

This site is under construction.  Students can find links to posture cheat-sheets in one of the articles.
